name: Solara
currentFocus: Stabilize the shared-world meta-loop, RPC-first public write path, deterministic chronicle exports, interactive world feedback, First Myth onboarding, and Director-driven Daily Rite planning while keeping the public repository deployable and public-safe.
nextMilestone: Deploy and verify Supabase RPC/RLS hardening in the live backend, then continue modular extraction from App.jsx and add browser-level gameplay validation.
blockers: Supabase production policies must enforce the same trust rules before public traffic scales.
